name: k
description: A simple workflow for intentional, high quality coding work, comparative research, and prose editing.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, research, implement, and review code, and clean AI slop from prose
interface.longDescription: A compact coding workflow plugin that bundles planning, comparative research, implementation, review, and handoff guidance for intentional software development work inside Codex. It also detects and fixes AI "slop" in prose.
interface.defaultPrompt: Plan a change, research a technical topic, execute work against a repo plan, review code for structural problems, or clean AI slop from a document
